Round Lake Beach, IL 60073

citations.narrative:
Bedding for a dark-colored female chinchilla has not been changed frequent enough to minimize disease hazards. Per the
licensee, her bedding had not been changed in at least a week. About a third of material on her floor was droppings and
some of the shavings on the front side of the enclosure were visibly wet (the shavings in the back appeared dry). Not
providing clean, dry bedding for the chinchilla does not promote a clean and comfortable living space. Ensure to change
shavings more often for the chinchilla so that her space is maintained clean and dry.
***Correct by March 31, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with licensee.
n

narrative:
3.131(a) 
   
Sanitation. 
Bedding for a dark-colored female chinchilla has not been changed frequent enough to minimize disease hazards. Per the 
licensee, her bedding had not been changed in at least a week. About a third of material on her floor was droppings and 
some of the shavings on the front side of the enclosure were visibly wet (the shavings in the back appeared dry). Not 
providing clean, dry bedding for the chinchilla does not promote a clean and comfortable living space. Ensure to change 
shavings more often for the chinchilla so that her space is maintained clean and dry.  
***Correct by March 31, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with licensee.
